chapters.title: Required Programmatic Input Vector
chapters.content_preview: Required Programmatic Input Vector  For every calculation, the engine requires an array containing the following state parameters for all 9 planets ($P_1$ to $P_9$) plus the Ascendant ($Lagna$):  Longitude ($\lambda$): Float value ($0.0^\circ$ to $359.99^\circ$).  House Placement

chapters.title: Longitude ($\lambda$): Float value ($0.0^\circ$ to $359.99^\circ$).
chapters.content_preview: Longitude ($\lambda$): Float value ($0.0^\circ$ to $359.99^\circ$).  House Placement ($H_n$): Integer (1 to 12) calculated from the chosen house-cusp system (typically Sri Pati or Equal House for classical yogas).  Sign Placement ($R_n$): Integer (1 to 12) representing Aries to P

chapters.title: A. Combustion (Astangata) Logic
chapters.content_preview: A. Combustion (Astangata) Logic  A planet loses its external material expression if its longitude falls within the critical orb of the Sun ($\lambda_{\text{Sun}}$).  $$\text{If } |\lambda_n - \lambda_{\text{Sun}}| \le \theta_{\text{combust}}, \text{ then } Combust_n = \text{True}

chapters.content_preview: If check_neechabhanga returns True, update the planetary status:  $$\text{Potency}_{\text{planet}} = | \text{Initial Deficit} | \times 1.5$$  The text commands that this triggers an ultimate architectural turnaround: early-stage operational friction followed by massive scaling.
